description: Native MQTT telemetry dashboard for MeshCore ETH-enabled repeaters and room servers

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "uptime_secs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: int(v: now()) / 1000000000 - int(v: r._time) / 1000000000 }))
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "uptime_secs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "battery_mv")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "queue_len")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio" and r._field == "noise_floor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio" and r._field == "last_rssi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio" and r._field == "last_snr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "errors")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packet_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "recv" or r._field == "sent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packet_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "flood_rx" or r._field == "flood_tx" or r._field == "direct_rx" or r._field == "direct_tx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packets" and r._field == "type")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> group(columns: ["packet_type"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _value: r._value,
      _field: if r.packet_type == "0" then "REQ"
        else if r.packet_type == "1" then "RESP"
        else if r.packet_type == "2" then "TXT"
        else if r.packet_type == "3" then "ACK"
        else if r.packet_type == "4" then "ADVERT"
        else if r.packet_type == "5" then "GRP_TXT"
        else if r.packet_type == "6" then "GRP_DATA"
        else if r.packet_type == "7" then "ANON_REQ"
        else if r.packet_type == "8" then "PATH"
        else if r.packet_type == "9" then "TRACE"
        else if r.packet_type == "10" then "MULTI"
        else if r.packet_type == "11" then "CTRL"
        else if r.packet_type == "15" then "RAW"
        else r.packet_type
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packets" and r._field == "type")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> group(columns: ["direction"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, _field: r.direction}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packet_stats" and r._field == "recv_errors")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "last_rssi" or r._field == "noise_floor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio" and r._field == "last_snr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_radio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_air_secs" or r._field == "rx_air_secs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_neighbors")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_neighbors" and r._field == "snr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_adverts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_packets")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 100)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_config")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meshcore_core" and r._field == "battery_mv")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id =~ /${node:regex}/)
  |> drop(columns: ["topic", "host"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

title: MeshCore Repeater Dashboard

__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: InfluxDB v2 datasource for MeshCore telemetry
